title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.4 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1766, with ECB rate at 2.00% and Fed at 3.75%; rate differential continues to weigh on EUR/USD, but recent gains may signal a shift in market sentiment.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% (lev_net=+1,029); watch for potential squeeze as institutional sentiment diverges from retail.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.0 signals normal volatility — a risk-on environment, with S&P 500 up 1.02% and MOVE Index at 72.2.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading near 0.7099, with RBA hiking rates; AUD carry supported, but watch for potential reversal as retail sentiment is extremely short (87%).
